# khaledwaleed.com

> A small, hand-built site by Khaled Waleed — senior software engineer in
> Baghdad. Quiet pages, one painting each, plain serif text. SvelteKit & Go
> for the day job; essays, notes, and lists for the rest.

## About

- Name: Khaled Waleed
- Role: Senior Software Engineer
- Location: Baghdad, Iraq
- Working at: Qi (qi.iq), Vitex (vitex.dev)
- Stack: SvelteKit, Nuxt, TypeScript, Go, PostgreSQL, Linux
- Email: contact@khaledwaleed.com

## Pages

- / — Home. Bio, current work, what I build.
- /about — Background, experience, toolkit.
- /writing — Essays and notes on software engineering.
- /writing/hiring-senior-engineers-in-iraq — Hiring seniors in the Iraqi market.
- /writing/the-cost-of-a-slow-page — Why page speed is a tax on the whole business.
- /writing/building-for-the-web-from-baghdad — Shipping production software from Iraq.
- /now — What I'm working on, building, reading, learning right now. Updated periodically.
- /likes — A scattered catalogue of obsessions: cinema, music, art, style, food, philosophy.
- /contact — Email, LinkedIn, Telegram, WhatsApp, GitHub.
- /rss.xml — RSS feed for the writing.

## Style note

Each page is paired with one public-domain Northern Romantic painting
(Friedrich, Dahl, Spitzweg). The site is set in EB Garamond and Cormorant
Garamond. There is no JavaScript framework chrome on display — only text,
paintings, and quiet rules.
